changes.check: Behavioural scope explicitly defined
changes.evidence: Prompt §§15-401 define Phase 0-7 structure with three explicit STOP gates. Scope bounded to: (1) validate_staged_psi_activation_readiness.py DERIVED_MARKER_IDS policy, (2) backend/core/ wiring corrections for blood/iron/oxygen, (3) backend/tests/ additions. Frontend explicitly excluded (prompt:125). Medical content modification prohibited (prompt:142-158). Knowledge Bus medical content read-only unless strictly non-medical metadata for runtime integration.

changes.check: Regression targets confirmed and coverage-adequate

changes.check: No scope creep risk — STOP gates adequate

Three STOP gates with explicit trigger lists close all known creep vectors. Phase 2 target selection order is explicit (prompt:199-205).

changes.check: Determinism risks surfaced
changes.result: THREE RISKS IDENTIFIED — all mitigated by STOP gates
changes.evidence: Risk 1: Removing transferrin_saturation from DERIVED_MARKER_IDS must be lab-provided-only; if a calculated path is required instead, STOP gate 2 fires and the calculation path becomes carry-forward — prompt correctly handles this. Risk 2: Signal firing changes must not alter unrelated domains; STOP gate 3 (prompt:276-283) closes this. Risk 3: test_validate_staged_psi_activation_readiness.py:101 assertion must be updated, not silently broken — Phase 6 mandate covers this but Cursor must understand the assertion content changes, not just that tests must pass.

changes.check: STOP gates protect behavioural correctness
changes.evidence: STOP gate 1 (build target safety, prompt:207-220): rejects medical-review-blocked content, frontend, raw Pass 3 reads, global ranges, unresolved package identity. STOP gate 2 (derived-marker safety, prompt:239-250): rejects formula invention, calculation without governed policy, global ranges, medical content changes. STOP gate 3 (runtime safety, prompt:276-283): rejects ambiguous package identity, unresolved KB content, silent side effects on unrelated domains, untestable behaviour.

changes.check: Forbidden files prohibition present and enforced
changes.evidence: prompt:136-141 — tooling files explicitly prohibited: .codex/, .cursor/, .vscode/, AGENTS.md. automation_bus/latest_gate_evidence.json and latest_gate_output.txt also explicitly protected. Knowledge Bus medical content and generated_pilot/ artefacts are read-only.

overall_verdict: HARDENED. All 5 front-matter fields valid. All 8 mandatory authority files present and content-verified for the two key inputs (P1-17 handoff manifest, P1-17 blocker resolution). Critical source cross-references confirmed: (1) transferrin_saturation is SSOT-canonical at biomarkers.yaml:1865; (2) DERIVED_MARKER_IDS policy mismatch confirmed at validate_staged_psi_activation_readiness.py:32 — mismatch is real and resolvable via option A; (3) pkg_kb61 signal_library correctly uses dependencies.derived_metrics: [] confirming lab-provided mode is safe; (4) golden panel already handles lab-provided transferrin_saturation; (5) regression target test_validate_staged_psi_activation_readiness.py:101 identified and must be updated. Determinism risks surfaced and closed by STOP gates. No blockers found.
